questions.text: What is the overall goal, purpose or aim of this study?
choices: Diagnostic: estimating current disease status or distinguishing between patients with and without a disease
Screening: identifying asymptomatic or general-population individuals who are likely to have or develop a disease
Prognostic: predicting future clinical outcomes for patients with a particular disease
Etiologic: identifying factors associated with or causing disease or health outcomes
Treatment effect: evaluating the effect of an intervention or comparing interventions
Descriptive: describing disease prevalence, incidence, characteristics, or trends without primarily making predictions
Other: the goal of the study does not fit any of the other categories
Unknown from this paper

questions.text: What is the number of patients or cohort size included in this study?
choices: Unknown from this paper

questions.text: In what way is the cohort or sample of patients described in this study, for example regarding demographics, medical history, and so on?
What information about the dataset is provided in this study, for example regarding the features, provenance, data quality, missing values, and so on?
What type of data or data modalities are used in this study?
choices: Tabular data: structured data represented as rows and columns
Time-series data: data points that have temporal relationships between them
Image data: data consisting of images
Text data: data consisting of (free) text
Audio data: data consisting of audio recordings
Video data: data consisting of video recordings
Multimodal data: data consisting of multiple modalities (e.g., tabular, text, image, audio)
Other: the data or data modalities do not fit any of the other categories
Unknown from this paper

questions.text: To which ICD-10 code group does the disease or health condition in this study pertain?
choices: A00-B99: Infectious and parasitic diseases
C00-D48: Neoplasms
D50-D89: Diseases of the blood and blood-forming organs and certain disorders involving the immune mechanism
E00-E90: Endocrine, nutritional and metabolic diseases
F00-F99: Mental and behavioural disorders
G00-G99: Diseases of the nervous system
H00-H59: Diseases of the eye and adnexa
H60-H95: Diseases of the ear and mastoid process
I00-I99: Diseases of the circulatory system
J00-J99: Diseases of the respiratory system
K00-K93: Diseases of the digestive system
L00-L99: Diseases of the skin and subcutaneous tissue
M00-M99: Diseases of the musculoskeletal system and connective tissue
N00-N99: Diseases of the genitourinary system
O00-O99: Pregnancy, childbirth, and the puerperium
P00-P96: Certain conditions originating in the perinatal period
Q00-Q99: Congenital malformations, deformations and chromosomal abnormalities
S00-T98: Injury, poisoning and certain other consequences of external causes
Other: the disease or health condition does not fit any of the other categories
